name: core.openwop.integration
description: Spec-canonical integration pack — universal communication primitives that route through the host's provider-specific adapters. Phase 1 v1.0.0 ships email-send + slack-message (both communication; both side-effectful with engine Layer-2 cost-once caching via deterministic Idempotency-Key derivation). File-system, database-query, and GitHub-action nodes defer to future minors — each needs real connection-pool / credential abstractions in the host.
author: OpenWOP Working Group

nodes.label: Email Send
nodes.description: Sends an email via the host's email adapter. Provider-agnostic — host routes to SMTP / SES / Resend / SendGrid / whatever it advertises in `Capabilities.email.providers`. Side-effectful + cacheable. Deterministic Idempotency-Key derivation (SHA-256 over runId+nodeId+to+subject+body) so the engine's Layer-2 cache prevents duplicate sends on replay.

nodes.label: Slack Message
nodes.description: Posts a message to Slack via the host's Slack adapter. Supports text + blocks + thread-reply. Side-effectful + cacheable. Deterministic Idempotency-Key prevents duplicate posts on replay.
